steps.title: Hardware Identification
steps.content: Verify bed rails, pocket adapters, and clamp assemblies.

es.title: Identificación de Herrajes
es.content: Verify bed rails, pocket adapters, and clamp assemblies.

steps.title: Install Pocket Adapters
steps.content: Insert stake pocket mounts (EI086) in pockets and expand. Align holes front-to-back.

es.title: Install Pocket Adapters
es.content: Insert stake pocket mounts (EI086) in pockets and expand. Align holes front-to-back.

steps.title: Mount Rails
steps.content: Bolt AA101 truck bed rail bars onto pocket adapter posts. Clamp equipment racks to rail.

es.title: Mount Rails
es.content: Bolt AA101 truck bed rail bars onto pocket adapter posts. Clamp equipment racks to rail.
